---
title: "QR landing page: directing to..."
format: html
---

```{=html}
<meta http-equiv="refresh" content="0; url=/about.html">
<link rel="canonical" href="/about.html">
<p>If you are not redirected automatically, follow this <a href='[maxoosterwegel.com/about](maxoosterwegel.com/about)'>link</a>.</p>
